subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of the garment of Revelation hath perfumed the world, yet most of mankind are afflicted with a spiritual cold to such a degree that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرف قمیص ظهور عالم را معطر نموده ولکن اکثری از ناس بمرض زکام مبتلی بقسمیکه
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
